description: Architecting enterprise knowledge retrieval systems (RAG) to safely expose internal data to LLM layers, minimizing hallucinations and non-deterministic behavior. Leading the modernization and scaling of the corporate multi-tenant ecosystem (13 platforms across 7 countries) handling high-traffic volume on AWS and Docker environments. Driving tech-stack evolution and engineering processes, shifting team velocity through structured AI assistance and rigorous code review patterns.
Full-stack delivery of business applications with strong SQL depth, API integrations, and project coordination responsibilities, including training and knowledge sharing.
Designing retrieval-based and AI-assisted systems that connect architecture decisions to practical business usage, with emphasis on reliability and production readiness.
